news.headline: J.D. Power finds high satisfaction levels with wireless internet providers. Quality service noted.
news.summary: TROY, Michigan—According to J.D. Power, wireless internet providers are excelling in customer satisfaction with high ratings. The report highlights that consumers are generally pleased with the quality of service provided by wireless internet companies. The survey indicates a significant increase in satisfaction levels across the industry. Customers seem to have a positive experience with the reliability and reach of their wireless internet connections.

news.headline: Mitel introduces Mitel Interaction Recording (MIR) Insights AI to enhance business analytics with automated analysis.
news.summary: Mitel, a prominent company in business communications based in Sunnyvale, California, has launched Mitel Interaction Recording (MIR) Insights AI worldwide. This new solution aims to offer enhanced business analytics by automating the analysis and categorization of recorded communications. Making use of a GenAI engine supported by Microsoft Azure AI Services and OpenAI foundation models, MIR Insights AI grants customer service professionals access to AI-driven insights.

news.headline: Riverside Health partners with Abridge to enhance clinician & patient experience. Agreement covers 750 providers & all care settings.
news.summary: Abridge, a leading company specializing in generative AI for clinical documentation, recently secured a comprehensive expansion deal with Riverside Health, a prominent integrated care system based in South Eastern Virginia with a vast network of more than 750 providers. Following a thorough assessment of various options and a fruitful two-month trial period, Riverside has decided to deploy Abridge's services throughout all its care facilities and medical disciplines. This initiative covers a wide range of settings, including the emergency department and inpatient hospitals, aiming to enhance efficiency and accuracy in clinical documentation.

news.headline: Tesla is most shorted security in the Americas in Sept, H&M replaces LVMH in EMEA, per Hazeltree Report.
news.summary: In September, Tesla reclaimed its position as the most crowded large-cap security in the Americas, as per the recent Shortside Crowdedness Report by Hazeltree. The report highlighted that H & M Hennes Mauritz AB took over LVMH as the most crowded shorted large-cap stock in EMEA. Additionally, Commonwealth Bank of Australia and Toyota surpassed Mitsubishi Heavy Ind in terms of crowdedness. These findings showcase the dynamic landscape of crowded securities in different regions.

news.headline: iCapital launches Multi-Investment Workflow tool for wealth managers to simplify portfolio construction with 100,000 users.
news.summary: In New York, iCapital1 unveiled its Multi-Investment Workflow tool for the wealth management sector, catering to over 100,000 wealth managers on iCapital Marketplace. The tool simplifies the investment process, enabling financial advisors to handle numerous alternative investments within a single, cohesive workflow. The introduction of this innovative tool marks a significant advancement for iCapital in streamlining the investing experience for wealth managers.

news.headline: ON24 to release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7 after US markets close. Conference call at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time.
news.summary: SAN FRANCISCO-- ON24 (NYSE: ONTF) is set to disclose its Q3 2024 financial outcomes after U.S. markets close on Thursday, November 7, 2024. The management will conduct a conference call and webcast at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time) on the same day to address business and financial performance. The event details are as follows: ON24 Third Quarter 2024 Earnings Call, scheduled for Thursday, November 7, 2024, at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time). For webcast, visit investors.ON24.com.

news.headline: Pending U.S. home sales up 2% from a year earlier, biggest increase in 3 years, according to Redfin report.
news.summary: In Seattle, recent data from Redfin, the technology-powered real estate brokerage listed on NASDAQ as RDFN, shows a noteworthy 2% increase in pending U.S. home sales compared to a year ago over the four-week period ending on October 6. This marks the most significant rise in three years as per the report. The surge in demand also extended to earlier stages of the homebuying process. The Homebuyer Demand Index by Redfin, which gauges tours and other purchasing services provided by Redfin agents, stayed close to its peak since May last week. Additionally, mortgage-purchase applications also observed a positive trend.

news.headline: WEX Inc. (NYSE: WEX) to announce Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 24. Conference call at 10:00 AM ET.
news.summary: A multinational corporation, WEX Inc. (NYSE: WEX), revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 before trading begins on Thursday, October 24, 2024. The Chair and Chief Executive Officer, Melissa Smith, along with the Chief Financial Officer, Jagtar Narula, will lead a conference call at 10:00 AM ET the same morning to delve into the company's outcomes. The conference call will be available for live online viewing.

news.headline: Telesign wins Fraud Prevention award 2nd year in a row at CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards.
news.summary: Telesign, a prominent provider of customer identity and engagement solutions, has revealed that their Verify API has been named the winner in the "Overall Fraud Prevention Solution Provider of the Year" category. This marks the second consecutive year that Telesign has been honored with this award. The recognition comes from the annual CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards program, organized by CyberSecurity Breakthrough, a respected independent market intelligence entity that highlights the top companies in the industry.

news.headline: cTRL Therapeutics expands in Toronto with investment from FACIT, enhancing cell therapy development capabilities in Canada.
news.summary: In Toronto and San Francisco on October 10, 2024, cTRL Therapeutics revealed its plans to enhance Canada's cell therapy development capabilities with the establishment of a new laboratory. The biotechnology firm is focused on advancing innovative cell therapies for solid tumors. This move is expected to bring in a significant influx of scientific talent to bolster cTRL Therapeutics' capabilities in this area of research. The company aims to leverage this new lab and talent to further its development efforts in the field.

news.headline: North Highland named in 2 Forrester reports on AI in HR and customer-focused culture; highlights HR teams' lack of readiness for AI.
news.summary: In Atlanta, North Highland, a prominent change and transformation consultancy, has been recognized in two recent Forrester reports: "The AI-HR Paradox" and "Behaviors: The Building Blocks of Customer-Focused Culture." The "AI-HR Paradox" report delves into the suitability of HR teams for AI integration, noting their efficiency and productivity needs. However, it highlights that despite being strong candidates for AI, they lack readiness for its safe implementation, labeling them as "woefully underprepared." The report stresses the importance of addressing this gap to effectively harness AI benefits in the HR sector.

news.headline: Elanco Animal Health (NYSE: ELAN) to announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7, 2024, and conduct conference call.
news.summary: Elanco Animal Health Incorporated (NYSE: ELAN) from Greenfield, Indiana, is set to reveal its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on November 7, 2024. This announcement will coincide with a conference call held on the same day for investors and media representatives to discuss the results.

news.headline: Hyundai Mobis debuts at Paris Motor Show with Europe-specific products, showcasing ten strategic products.
news.summary: A private exhibition is set to commence on the 14th with a focus on attracting European clients and enhancing networking opportunities. The exhibition will feature ten key products emphasizing electrification, autonomous driving, and connectivity to cater to the demands of the European market. The event will take place in Paris and Seoul, South Korea.

news.headline: Simbian introduces industry-first AI Agents to boost security operations for businesses, catering to SOC analysts, Threat Hunters, and GRC teams.
news.summary: A company based in Mountain View, California called Simbian® revealed a new set of AI Agents designed to revolutionize security operations for businesses. These AI Agents are the first of their kind in the industry and are intended to augment security teams by boosting their efficiency, insight, and scope across their security initiatives. Operating on the Simbian Security Accelerator Platform, these AI Agents specifically target the key challenges faced by Security Operations Center (SOC) analysts, Threat Hunters, and Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) teams. This innovative solution aims to tackle critical issues within security programs and enhance overall performance for businesses.

news.headline: Veradigm integrates NLP into EHR dataset for deeper clinical insights, creating regulatory-grade RWD for research.
news.summary: In Chicago, Veradigm®, a prominent provider of healthcare data and technology solutions, revealed the incorporation of advanced natural language processing (NLP) into its electronic health record (EHR) dataset. This integration optimizes the utilization of unstructured EHR data by merging it with structured data to generate high-quality, real-world data (RWD) suitable for research purposes. The Veradigm Network EHR Data, derived from various sources, now offers enhanced insights for analysis.

news.headline: Higher Collective opens adult-use cannabis shop in Bridgeport, Connecticut. Grand opening on Oct 11-12, 2024. Dedicated to social equity.
news.summary: A grand opening celebration will take place at a location in Fairfield County on Friday, October 11 and Saturday, October 12. Based in Bridgeport, Connecticut, Higher Collective, a cannabis retail brand focused on promoting social equity, will be unveiling its latest store. The event will mark an exciting milestone for the company, which is known for its dedication to supporting underrepresented communities.

news.headline: Alchemy, a circular technology company, reports $711M revenue, fueling circular economy growth, hitting record numbers.
news.summary: Ireland-based company Alchemy, a leading circular technology company, has reported a significant milestone with record revenues of $711 million for the fiscal year ending on March 31, 2024. This achievement solidifies Alchemy's position as one of the fastest-growing companies in the industry.

news.headline: Lakeshore Learning wins "Rural Investor Award" in Utah at the One Utah Summit for education retail. (Characters: 96)
news.summary: An esteemed developer and retailer of educational materials, Lakeshore Learning Materials, was recognized by the Utah Inland Port Authority during the One Utah Summit from October 7 to 9 in Cedar City. The event took place in Carson, California on October 10, 2024. Lakeshore Learning Materials is widely known for providing top-notch educational resources for teachers and children.

news.headline: Fathom Holdings CEO Marco Fregenal wins 2024 HousingWire Vanguard Award for transformative leadership in real estate industry. $FTHM.
news.summary: Fregenal's exceptional leadership in the real estate sector has been acknowledged recently. Fathom Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: FTHM) praised Fregenal for his transformative approach in the industry. The company, a prominent national real estate services platform, recognized his contributions on Oct. 10, 2024. Fathom, known for its innovative technology-driven services, lauded Fregenal for his impactful leadership in the field.

news.headline: Prime Therapeutics presents 10 research studies at AMCP Nexus 2024, including GLP-1 obesity research and social determinants of health.
news.summary: Prime Therapeutics LLC, based in EAGAN, Minn., demonstrated its industry leadership by showcasing 10 research studies, such as Prime's GLP-1 obesity research and the exploration of social determinants of health impact. The event, held on Oct. 10, 2024, highlighted the company's commitment to advancing pharmacy solutions.

news.headline: Ameren Corporation to host Q3 earnings webcast on Nov. 7, 2024 with CEO and CFO. Stock symbol: AEE. St. Louis, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: The chairman, president, and CEO of Ameren Corp., Martin J. Lyons Jr., along with Michael L. Moehn, the senior executive vice president and CFO, are scheduled to talk about the third quarter financial results of Ameren Corp. (NYSE: AEE) on October 10, 2024. This discussion will also cover earnings guidance and other relevant topics related to the company.

news.headline: Runergy challenges Trina Solar's patents US9,722,104 and US10,230,009 as unpatentable at USPTO.
news.summary: In Huntsville, Alabama on October 10, 2024, Runergy disclosed its recent actions against Trina Solar by filing to cancel two patents, US9,722,104 and US10,230,009, with the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) on October 8th, 2024. Runergy believes these patents lack patentability. This move by Runergy follows...

news.headline: FoodSaver® introduces Handheld+ 2-in-1 Vacuum Sealing System, merging countertop and handheld vacuum sealing.
news.summary: A new advancement by FoodSaver has introduced a groundbreaking product that merges the capabilities of a countertop vacuum and heat-sealing device with the portability of a cordless handheld tool. This all-in-one machine offers space-saving benefits. The development was announced in Atlanta on October 10, 2024. Further details can be found on PRNewswire.

news.headline: Johnson & Johnson MedTech releases VOLT™ Plating System for orthopaedic procedures, promising flexibility and stability.
news.summary: Johnson & Johnson MedTech has introduced a cutting-edge Plating System on October 10, 2024, in West Chester, Penn. The system offers advanced fracture care for orthopaedic procedures. This innovative technology provides a blend of flexibility and stability, enhancing patient outcomes during surgeries. Johnson & Johnson MedTech, known for their expertise in orthopaedic solutions, aims to revolutionize fracture care through this new system.

news.headline: Stellantis to report Q3 2024 shipments and revenues on Oct 31.
Get the latest on sector & industry performance; monitor stocks within the market. Stay updated with key indicators.
NXP Semiconductors to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 4 after market close, with conference call on Nov 5 at 8:00am EST.
news.summary: NXP Semiconductors N.V., a company listed on NASDAQ under NXPI, revealed that it plans to unveil its financial outcomes for the third quarter of 2024 post the NASDAQ Global Select Market's regular trading hours on November 4, 2024. A conference call has been scheduled for November 5, 2024, at 8:00 a.m. EST for discussing these results with the financial community.

news.headline: Data breach at MoneyGram potentially impacting 150 million customer records under investigation.
news.summary: An investigation by Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP in San Francisco has been launched into a data breach that has exposed the private personal details of potentially 150 million customers of MoneyGram Payment Systems, Inc. The Texas-based peer-to-peer payment and money transfer company is facing scrutiny following this breach.

news.headline: Adient to discuss Q4 fiscal 2024 results on Nov 8, 2024 at 8:30 a.m. (ET) in a conference call.
news.summary: Automotive seating leader, Adient (NYSE: ADNT), based in Plymouth, Michigan, has announced a conference call scheduled for November 8, 2024, at 8:30 a.m. (ET) to review its fiscal 2024 fourth quarter financial performance. The conference call will be accompanied by a live webcast.

news.headline: Orlance, Inc. receives $3.3M NIH SBIR grant for MACH-1™ Enhanced Seasonal Influenza Vaccine development.
news.summary: A Seattle-based biotech company, Orlance, Inc., has received a Fast Track Small Business Innovation Research grant (R44AI186932) from the National Institutes of Health. The grant is intended to aid in the development of an Enhanced Seasonal Influenza Vaccine. This marks a significant milestone for Orlance, highlighting their commitment to advancing healthcare solutions.

news.headline: Brera Holdings and THADDBOII's original series hits 4,458,371 views. "Brera F.C. Soccer Road to Glory" includes 24 episodes.
news.summary: A captivating series titled "Brera F.C. Soccer Road to Glory" was launched on June 20th, comprising 24 exciting episodes. The series can now be streamed on various platforms such as X, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube, allowing fans to follow the team's journey to success.

news.headline: AppFolio, Inc. will release Q3 2024 financial results on Oct. 24, 2024 after U.S. markets close. (NASDQ: APPF)
news.summary: In Santa Barbara, California, on October 10, 2024, AppFolio, Inc. (NASDAQ: APPF) disclosed its plan to unveil the financial results for the third quarter of 2024 subsequent to the closure of the U.S. financial markets on Thursday, October 24, 2024.

news.headline: United Airlines is expanding with 8 new international destinations in Summer 2025, including Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia; Kaohsiung, Taiwan; Nuuk, Greenland; Palermo, Italy; Bilbao, Spain; Madeira Island, Portugal; Faro, Portugal, and Dakar, Senegal. Their summer schedule will feature their largest-ever trans-Atlantic flights.
news.summary: In the upcoming summer schedule of 2025, United Airlines will be introducing flights to eight new cities. These destinations include Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia; Kaohsiung, Taiwan; Nuuk, Greenland; Palermo, Italy; Bilbao, Spain; Madeira Island, Portugal; Faro, Portugal; and Dakar, Senegal. This marks a significant expansion for United as they plan to operate their largest-ever trans-Atlantic schedule during the summer of 2025.

news.headline: Armlogi Holding Corp. makes progress with Temu platform with API upgrade to version 3.5, enhancing services for all customers.
news.summary: In Walnut, California, a warehousing and logistics service provider, Armlogi Holding Corp. (Nasdaq: BTOC), has revealed progress in its partnership with Temu, the e-commerce platform. They have upgraded their application programming interface (API) to version 3.5 and fully integrated it with their Warehouse Management System (WMS). This enhancement allows all Temu customers to easily access Armlogi’s supply-chain solutions for warehouse management and order fulfillment.

news.headline: Bank of South Carolina Corp. earned $1,801,863 in Q3 2024, up 42.62% from previous quarter.
news.summary: Charleston, South Carolina on October 10, 2024 - The Bank of South Carolina Corporation (OTCQX: BKSC) has reported unaudited earnings totaling $1,801,863 for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024. This translates to $0.33 in basic and diluted earnings per share. The earnings for this quarter have shown a notable increase of $538,493, marking a rise of 42.62% compared to the previous earnings period.

news.headline: AXIL Brands, Inc. releases Q1 fiscal year 2025 financial results, highlighting ABIL hearing and Reviv3 products.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, a global consumer products company, AXIL Brands, Inc., shared its financial and operational performance for the first quarter ending on August 31, 2024. The company, listed on NYSE American as AXIL, is known for its AXIL® hearing protection and enhancement products, as well as Reviv3® hair and skin care products. The announcement did not disclose specific figures but indicated significant updates regarding the company's progress during the specified period.

news.headline: Waters introduces new tools for RNA analysis, speeding up development of mRNA vaccines and therapies with LC-MS grade reagents, enzymes, and software.
news.summary: New LC-MS grade reagents, enzymes, and software by Waters are designed to streamline large molecule RNA analysis, aiding in the faster development of mRNA vaccines, personalized cancer therapies, and new drugs for genetic disorders. The innovative digestion enzymes ensure comprehensive RNA analysis, enhancing the process for researchers.

news.headline: Enviri Corp (NYSE: NVRI) to release Q3 2024 results on Oct 31, hosting conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Enviri Corporation (NYSE: NVRI) revealed plans to release its third quarter 2024 earnings report on October 31, 2024, before the NYSE market opens. The company will conduct its quarterly conference call and webcast starting at 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day.

news.headline: Howmet Aerospace will announce third quarter 2024 results through a webcast.
news.summary: Howmet Aerospace, a company based in Pittsburgh, is set to host a webcast to announce its third-quarter 2024 results. This event will provide updates on the financial performance and key metrics of the company during that period. Shareholders and interested individuals can tune in to the webcast to gain insights into Howmet Aerospace's performance. The webcast is scheduled to take place on [specific date] and will be accessible on the company's website. This announcement signifies the importance of transparency and communication with stakeholders in the business community.

news.headline: Emerald Lake Capital Management hires Stephen Burhenn, Derrick Lee, and Katie Slodzinski, expanding investment team.
news.summary: Emerald Lake Capital Management in Santa Monica, California revealed on October 10, 2024, that Stephen Burhenn, Derrick Lee, and Katie Slodzinski have joined their investment team. Stephen Burhenn, formerly of Ares Management, is among the new additions, showcasing the firm's continued growth.

news.headline: Genpact (NYSE: G) to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 7 after markets close. Management to host conference.
news.summary: Genpact (NYSE: G) is set to announce its financial results for the third quarter of 2024, covering the period ending on September 30. The report will be made public after the U.S. financial markets close on Thursday, November 7, 2024. Subsequently, Genpact's management will conduct a conference to discuss the results.

news.headline: Global Dayforce Discover 2024 unites attendees to explore new solutions and best practices with keynote live stream open for registration.
news.summary: Participants from around the world will have the opportunity to explore innovative solutions, learn about customer success stories, and witness groundbreaking innovations at the leading Dayforce event. The keynote live stream is now available for registration, providing access to a wealth of valuable insights and information. This global event is set to attract a significant number of attendees eager to discover the latest advancements in the industry.

news.headline: Energy Vault to release Q3 2024 earnings on Nov 12, 2024, with conference call at 4:30 PM ET. Call info: 1-877-704-4453.
news.summary: Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: NRGV), a prominent provider of sustainable grid-scale energy storage solutions based in Westlake Village, Calif., revealed that it will disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on Tuesday, November 12, 2024. The announcement will be followed by a conference call scheduled for 4:30 PM ET. For those interested in participating, they can dial 1-877-704-4453 within the U.S. or 1-201-389-0920 for international callers. This call will allow individuals to join the Energy Vault earnings discussion.

news.headline: Eastside Distilling, Inc. merges with Beeline Financial Holdings, Inc. to leverage market opportunity, anticipates Fed rate cuts.
news.summary: The rapid completion of the closing timeline highlights the considerable market potential for Beeline amidst expectations of further interest rate reductions by the Federal Reserve and a rising number of mortgage applications. Additionally, the company has successfully finalized a debt-for-equity exchange as part of its efforts to enhance its financial position and bolster its balance sheet.

news.headline: SCYNEXIS will participate in 2024 Maxim Healthcare Virtual Summit; CEO to join fireside chat on Oct 17 at 11:30 A.M. ET.
news.summary: Jersey City, New Jersey, October 10, 2024 - SCYNEXIS, Inc. (NASDAQ: SCYX), a leading biotechnology company focused on developing groundbreaking medicines to address challenging and drug-resistant infections, shared that David Angulo, M.D., as President and CEO, will engage in a fireside chat during the 2024 Maxim Healthcare Virtual Summit on Thursday, October 17, at 11:30 A.M. ET. This event aims to highlight innovative approaches in the healthcare sector, with Dr. Angulo's insights adding value to the discussion.

news.headline: Avive Solutions partners with ADS to enhance AED technology, benefiting the DoD and Federal Government.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in San Francisco, Avive Solutions, a prominent company specializing in groundbreaking Automated External Defibrillator (AED) technology, announced its partnership with ADS, a crucial procurement provider for the Department of Defense (DoD) and the Federal Government. Through this collaboration, Avive aims to expand its reach and provide its cutting-edge AED solutions to greater audiences within these sectors.

news.headline: Soluna (NASDAQ: SLNH) CFO to join Fireside Chat on 10/16 at 1:00 PM ET by Water Tower Research. Discussion on $25M growth capital.
news.summary: In Albany, New York, Soluna Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: SLNH), a company specializing in green data centers for demanding computing tasks like Bitcoin mining and AI, revealed that John Tunison, the CFO, will join the Water Tower Research Fireside Chat Series on Wednesday, October 16, 2024, at 1:00 PM ET. This discussion is accessible to all investors and will cover various topics, including the recently unveiled $25 million growth capital.

news.headline: LM Funding America Inc. reassures operations unaffected by Hurricane Milton; Bitcoin mining to remain intact with distributed miners.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on October 10, 2024, LM Funding America Inc. (NASDAQ: LMFA), a technology-based finance firm, revealed that its Bitcoin mining activities should not be impacted by Hurricane Milton. The company's strategic placement of miners across various locations has shielded the operations from any disruptions. LM Funding is confident that its Bitcoin mining endeavors will persist smoothly and remain unharmed by the hurricane.

news.headline: glassybaby named Top Community Champion of 2024 by US Chamber of Commerce CO-100, from a group of 100 small businesses.
news.summary: A prestigious recognition has been awarded to glassybaby, an art-glass votive company based in the USA. The US Chamber of Commerce CO-100 has honored glassybaby as the Top Community Champion among a group of distinguished small businesses. This year, glassybaby secured a spot in the top ten small businesses of 2024, showcasing its commitment to community impact and excellence in business practices. The company's dedication to its mission and the quality of its USA-made products are highlighted through this recognition.

news.headline: ChargePoint simplifies EV home charging with installation program; users in US can buy Home Flex charger with seamless installation.
news.summary: In Campbell, California, ChargePoint (NYSE: CHPT), a prominent provider of networked charging solutions for electric vehicles (EVs), has revealed that customers in the United States buying a ChargePoint Home Flex residential charger can now opt for a seamless, cost-effective, and effortless home installation along with their purchase. The innovative service aims to create a convenient "one stop shop" for EV owners looking to buy and set up a home charger. This program offers an easy solution for customers to purchase and install a home charger, underscoring ChargePoint's commitment to customer convenience in the EV charging space.
